verifier: adversarial: data snooping & construction artifacts (independent re-derivation)

availability_le_55c.note: 1-interval difference at the 0.55 boundary / slip convention; within tolerance

t0_join_ask_minus_mid.note: same sign/magnitude; median differs 0.5c on tiny n

attacks.lookahead: p20 in pm_prices_sample = nearest prices-history minute point within 90s of t0+20 (harvest.py), so the 'uncensored ~20s' snapshot can be a trade/mid up to t0+110s — mislabeled timing, and it is a mid not an ask. HOWEVER the family disclosed exactly this caveat and anchored the fill recipe on 155 real ledger fills at entrySec p50=9s, which are genuine decision-time asks. No look-ahead in the deliverable itself; the signal (prior open-to-open move) is fully known at t0.
attacks.boundary_overlap: Independent buffered open-to-open construction with strict 300s-consecutive candle check joins all 216 pm markets; reproduces exactly. No boundary artifact.
attacks.threshold_sensitivity: TH 12bps -> 14.4bps: median .525/.525, avail .714/.725 (stable). TH -> 9.6bps: median .515, avail .802 (effect direction intact). Cap sensitivity is steep by construction (avail .245 @50c, .714 @55c, .959 @60c) — backtests must treat the 55c cap as a first-order assumption, which the finding itself quantifies.
attacks.multiple_comparisons: Descriptive cost-input measurement, not a hypothesis-test edge claim; Bonferroni discount not applicable to quantile estimation. The finding explicitly disclaims edge and flags last-third win .38 as unresolved — reproduced.
attacks.effective_n: 155 fills come from only 70 unique intervals (reversal/reversal2/latentfire co-fire); independent observations ~70, not 155. Quantiles barely move but CIs implied by n=155 are ~1.5x too tight.
attacks.small_sample: pm sample spans only 2.99 days; availability 95% CI [0.59,0.83] (binomial) / [0.58,0.83] (1h block bootstrap). The '69%/31% skip' number should be used with that width.
attacks.censoring: 20.6% of ledger entries sit at the 55c cap (max .552) — confirms p90/p95=.55 are censored, as the finding states.
attacks.chrono_split: Signal c20: train median .530 avail .688 vs test median .505 avail .765; ledger halves median .510/.500 — matches family's claimed stability.
